title: Tandoori Chicken Wings in German Style
description: A twist on traditional German cuisine, this recipe combines the flavors of India with the rich taste of Germany.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, egg, garam masala, salt, and black pepper.
Add the tandoori masala to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Add the chicken wings to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray.
Arrange the chicken wings on the prepared baking sheet in a single layer.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Broil the chicken wings for 2-3 minutes or until they are nicely browned.
Serve hot with your favorite German sides.
